web_results.title: 2026 FIFA World Cup - Wikipedia
web_results.description: Two of the teams will be seeded based on the World Rankings, and they will play the winners of two knockout games between the four unseeded teams for the two FIFA World Cup berths. The four-game tournament is to be played in one or more of the host countries, and will also be used as a test event for the FIFA World Cup. The ratification of slot allocation also gives the OFC a guaranteed berth in the final tournament for the first time: the 2026 FIFA World Cup will be the first tournament in which all six confederations have at least one guaranteed berth and also the first time since the 2010 edition in which all confederations have a team qualified for the World Cup finals.

news_results.description: Ghana are in advanced discussions with Wales to play a friendly game before the 2026 World Cup in North America.

news_results.description: The Ghanaian team will train at Bryant, and a traveling Ghanaian contingent will stay in Providence.

news_results.title: FIFA to 'monitor developments' in Iran ahead of 2026 World Cup - ESPN
news_results.description: FIFA will "monitor developments" in Iran following the outbreak of military action by the United States -- the co-hosts of this summer's men's World Cup -- against the Middle Eastern nation.

news_results.title: IFAB To Implement New Time Wasting Rule In 2026 World Cup
news_results.description: The International Football Association Board (IFAB) has approved a sweeping package of rule changes aimed at increasing match tempo and clamping down on time-wasting, with the new measures set to take effect at the 2026 FIFA World Cup and across all competitions worldwide.
